# Abnormies

> A fully on-chain art collection derived from Normies (Serc, 2026), exploring network effects, lack of control, and randomness.

Abnormies is paired 1:1 with Normies. Each Abnormie has a seed Normie whose on-chain history shapes its evolution. Marks accumulate on a 40×40 grid from transfers, customizations, and the destructive actions of other holders. Marks cancel on collision. Coverage plateaus around fifty percent. The author is the network.

## Documentation

- [Specification (markdown)](https://abnormies.art/spec.md): Canonical project spec, machine-readable.
- [Specification (HTML)](https://abnormies.art/spec.html): Same spec, browser-rendered.
- [Overview](https://abnormies.art/): Public-facing introduction.

## Status

Site is live. Smart contracts are forthcoming.
